description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build TWiLight Menu++ Nightly that builds TWiLightMenu++ on every push to any branch and on every pull request. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a devkitARM container that checks out the repository, installs tools, gets manual pages, builds TWiLightMenu++, creates booter and TWiLightMenu CIAs, packs 7z packages for nightly, and publishes the build to GitHub Actions and TWLBot. Also, send success or failure webhooks to a Discord channel.
